channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Dallas' Naji Marshall gets 4-game suspension, Phoenix's Jusuf Nurkic is banned 3 games for fight
item.description: The NBA suspended Dallas Mavericks forward Naji Marshall for four games and Phoenix Suns center Jusuf Nurkic for three games for their roles in an on-court fight during Friday night's game. Dallas forward P.J. Washington was suspended one game.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Justin Herbert tosses 3 TDs, Chargers clinch a playoff spot with a 40-7 rout of Patriots
item.description: FOXBOROUGH, Mass. (AP) — Justin Herbert threw three touchdown passes and the Los Angeles Chargers clinched their second playoff appearance in three seasons with a 40-7 victory over the New England Patriots on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dodgers' Ohtani and wife will soon be welcoming a baby to the family
item.description: Between a marriage announcement, third MVP award and World Series title, Los Angeles Dodgers superstar Shohei Ohtani had a pretty good 2024. And now, it looks like 2025 may be even better for the Japanese two-way baseball phenom.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Mavs star Luka Doncic is latest pro athlete whose home was burglarized, business manager says
item.description: Luka Doncic of the Dallas Mavericks is the latest professional athlete whose home has been burglarized.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: NBA players suspended multiple games after ugly on-court fight
item.description: Three NBA players have been suspended following a fight between the Dallas Mavericks and the Phoenix Suns on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Georgia QB Carson Beck announces plan to enter NFL draft after season-ending elbow injury
item.description: Georgia quarterback Carson Beck has announced his plans to enter the NFL draft, five days after having season-ending elbow surgery.
item.dc:creator: Charles Odum, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Panthers place 1,000-yard rusher Chuba Hubbard on IR for final 2 games with strained calf
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Chuba Hubbard's season is over. The Panthers placed their leading rusher on injured reserve Saturday with a strained calf. Hubbard was limited in practice on Friday with a knee injury and was listed as questionable to play Sunday against the Tampa Bay Buccaneers.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Eli Manning and Antonio Gates are among the finalists for the Pro Football Hall of Fame
item.description: Two-time Super Bowl MVP Eli Manning, former Defensive Players of the Year Luke Kuechly and Terrell Suggs, and prolific tight end Antonio Gates are among the finalists for the 2025 Pro Football Hall of Fame class.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lehkonen gets hat trick as Colorado beats Utah, 4-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utah's struggles on its home ice continue. Artturi Lehkonen scored his first NHL hat trick, and the Colorado Avalanche won 4-1 against the Utah Hockey Club at Delta Center in Salt Lake City on Friday. Utah lost all three games on this current homestand.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Taylen Green leads Arkansas to 39-26 victory over Texas Tech in the Liberty Bowl
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. (AP) — Taylen Green threw for 341 yards and two touchdowns and ran for 81 yards in Arkansas' 39-26 victory over Texas Tech on Friday night in the Liberty Bowl. Green completed 11 of 21 passes and Arkansas (7-6) had 573 yards of total offense.
item.dc:creator: CLAY BAILEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: McCord throws for 453 yards, 5 TDs in No. 22 Syracuse's 52-35 Holiday Bowl win over Washington State
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Kyle McCord threw for 453 yards and five touchdowns to break Deshaun Watson's Atlantic Coast Conference season passing record and lead No. 22 Syracuse to a 52-35 victory over depleted-yet-scrappy Washington State in the Holiday Bowl on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: BERNIE WILSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 2 sailor deaths result in muted celebrations on winning yacht in Sydney to Hobart race
item.description: Champagne corks often pop and loud, boisterous cheers are usually heard around Constitution Dock when the Sydney to Hobart line honors winner finishes in the Tasmanian state capital.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS PASSA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Column: The path of Matthew Stafford looms for Caleb Williams
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — A skilled quarterback burdened by the dysfunction of his organization, doomed to toil in mediocrity for over a decade despite a high level of performance year in and year out.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Vanderbilt beats Georgia Tech 35-27 in Birmingham Bowl for first postseason win in 11 years
item.description: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. (AP) — Diego Pavia and Vanderbilt delivered another victory to end a surprising season. Pavia threw three touchdown passes and ran for two more scores and Vanderbilt secured its first winning season since 2013 with a 35-27 victory over Georgia Tech on Friday in the Birmingham Bowl.
item.dc:creator: JOHN ZENOR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NBA star Jimmy Butler to remain sidelined due to illness, according to Heat
item.description: Jimmy Butler has become synonymous with Heat basketball over his six seasons in Miami, but an illness has kept the star off the court several days.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Browns restructure QB Deshaun Watson's contract to create cap space, flexibility, AP source says
item.description: BEREA, Ohio (AP) — The Cleveland Browns have again restructured quarterback Deshaun Watson's massive contract to create salary-cap space and give them future flexibility, a person familiar with the move told The Associated Press on Friday.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Simone Biles sports custom Jonathan Owens outfit to Bears' final home game
item.description: Olympic gymnast Simone Biles wore a custom outfit dedicated to her husband, Chicago Bears safety Jonathan Owens, to his team's final home game of the season on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former Central Michigan quarterback Tommy Lazzaro, 27, killed in hunting accident
item.description: Former Central Michigan quarterback Tommy Lazzaro, who served as a sergeant in the U.S. Army, was tragically killed in a hunting accident over the weekend.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bulls take on the Bucks on 3-game skid
item.description: Milwaukee Bucks (16-13, fifth in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (13-18, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Chicago enters the matchup against Milwaukee after losing three straight games. The Bulls are 2-5 against division opponents.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Dodgers' Mookie Betts shares message to Yankees fans who tried to pry ball out of his glove in World Series
item.description: Los Angeles Dodgers right fielder Mookie Betts revealed his message for the the Yankees fans who tried to pry the ball out of his glove during Game 4 of the World Series.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: WWE star CM Punk rips Bears' leadership amid team's disappointing season
item.description: The Chicago Bears parted ways with head coach Matt Eberflus and will play their final two games of the season without any playoff hopes.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Holiday Bowl to kick off at brand-new Snapdragon Stadium for the first time
item.description: The Holiday Bowl has been woven into the fabric of San Diego for four decades. For a football city without a professional sports team, there is even more excitement surrounding this annual event.
item.dc:creator: Jaime Chambers, Fox 5

item.title: Brock Bowers closing in on record held by Mike Ditka
item.description: Las Vegas Raiders tight end Brock Bowers is poised to break Mike Ditka's rookie tight end record of 1,076 yards receiving in Week 17, with only ten yards needed to do so.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Breaking: Dave Fleming leaves CMU after 20 years
item.description: "I thank Coach Fleming for all his dedication and hard work at CMU," Colorado Mesa Athletic Director Joan McDermott said in a press release. "He is not only a great coach, but a special person and will be greatly missed.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Kiser, KREX 5

item.title: Matt Petgrave, involved in play that led to Adam Johnson's death, asks for donations for legal costs
item.description: Hockey player Matt Petgrave has called the death of Adam Johnson “a tragic accident” in a public appeal for donations to his legal costs amid a police investigation.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Aggies bounce back with 75-68 win over St. Mary's
item.description: MORAGA, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - Coming off its first loss of the season, the Utah State men’s basketball (11-1, 1-0 MW) got back in the win column Sunday night, closing out non-conference play with a 75-68 win over Saint Mary’s at the UCU Pavilion in Moraga.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah blows 3-goal lead in shootout loss to Anaheim
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Robby Fabbri scored twice, and the Anaheim Ducks rallied from down three goals to defeat the Utah Hockey Club 5-4 in a shootout at Delta Center on Sunday. “I think we just didn't stray away from our game,” said Fabbri.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 49ers eliminated from NFC playoffs before game against Miami. Cowboys, Saints, Cardinals also out
item.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — The defending NFC champion San Francisco 49ers were eliminated from the playoffs before their game at Miami began on Sunday because of victories by Washington and the Los Angeles Rams.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: GJ Tigers Grant Lewis and Will Weirath shine under varsity spotlight
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Grant Lewis and Will Weirath aren’t your average freshmen. They’re not just competing with older, more experienced players — they’re excelling. Their combined 25-point performance in the Tigers’ recent win highlights their remarkable season.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Tiger's son makes the ace. Bernhard Langer makes the winning putt in playoff over Woods at PNC
item.description: Tiger Woods never had so much fun losing in a playoff. For the 67-year-old Bernhard Langer, it never gets old winning the PNC Championship with his son.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Penix wins debut as Atlanta QB as Falcons return two picks for TDs, beat hapless Giants 34-7
item.description: Jessie Bates and Matthew Judon each had a pick-6 to carry Atlanta (8-7) to its second straight win after a four-game losing streak put its postseason hopes in jeopardy.
item.dc:creator: PAUL NEWBERRY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bucs' Mayfield loses key member of offense before his Texas homecoming
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers have another difficult road test in their attempt to win the NFC South title.
item.dc:creator: Dan Lucas, WFLA, NBC

item.title: College Football Playoffs looks for good matchups after snoozy first round of blowouts
item.description: For those who dozed through it, or flipped to more compelling fare in the NFL, here's a brief recap of the rollout of the much-anticipated College Football Playoff. Average final score: Winners 36, Losers 17.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: John Seidler takes over as control person of Padres after Peter's death
item.description: John Seidler, an entrepreneur and business executive, has been named the next control person of the San Diego Padres, pending approval by Major League Baseball, after the death of his brother Peter Seidler, the team's former owner.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Tatum scores a season-high 43 to go with 16 rebounds, 10 assist in Celtics 123-98 win over Bulls
item.description: Jayson Tatum scored a season-high 43 points, grabbed 16 rebounds and dished out 10 assists for his third career triple-double and the Boston Celtics beat the Chicago Bulls 123-98 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jeremiyah Love overcomes injury and illness to propel Notre Dame into 1st Sugar Bowl since 2007
item.description: Notre Dame running back Jeremiyah Love wasted no time sending a message to his teammates Friday night.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, Fox 5
